en: Now when David lived in his house, David said to Nathan the prophet, "Behold, I dwell in a house of cedar, but the ark of the covenant of the LORD is under a tent."
zh: 大衛住在自己宮中的時候，他對拿單先知說：“看哪，我住在香柏木做的王宮，耶和華的約櫃卻在帳幕裡。”

en: And Nathan said to David, "Do all that is in your heart, for God is with you."
zh: 拿單對大衛說：“你可以照你的心意去作，因為 神與你同在。”

en: But that same night the word of the LORD came to Nathan,
zh: 當夜， 神的話臨到拿單，說：

en: "Go and tell my servant David, 'Thus says the LORD: It is not you who will build me a house to dwell in.
zh: “你去對我的僕人大衛說：‘耶和華這樣說：你不可建殿給我居住。

en: For I have not lived in a house since the day I brought up Israel to this day, but I have gone from tent to tent and from dwelling to dwelling.
zh: 因為自從我領以色列人上來那天起，直到今日，我都未曾住過殿宇，只是從這帳幕到那帳幕，從這帳棚到那帳棚。

en: In all places where I have moved with all Israel, did I speak a word with any of the judges of Israel, whom I commanded to shepherd my people, saying, "Why have you not built me a house of cedar?"'
zh: 我和以色列眾人，無論走到甚麼地方，從沒有向以色列的哪一個士師，就是我所吩咐牧養我的子民的，說：你們為甚麼不給我建造香柏木的殿宇呢？’

en: Now, therefore, thus shall you say to my servant David, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts, I took you from the pasture, from following the sheep, to be prince over my people Israel,
zh: 現在你要對我的僕人大衛說：‘萬軍之耶和華這樣說：我把你從羊圈中選召出來，使你不再跟隨羊群，使你作領袖管治我的子民以色列。

en: and I have been with you wherever you have gone and have cut off all your enemies from before you. And I will make for you a name, like the name of the great ones of the earth.
zh: 無論你到哪裡去，我總與你同在；在你面前消滅你所有的仇敵；我必使你獲得名聲，好像世上偉人的名聲一樣。

en: And I will appoint a place for my people Israel and will plant them, that they may dwell in their own place and be disturbed no more. And violent men shall waste them no more, as formerly,
zh: 我要為我的子民以色列人選定一個地方，栽培他們，使他們住在自己的地方，不再受攪擾，也不再像從前被惡徒苦害他們，

en: from the time that I appointed judges over my people Israel. And I will subdue all your enemies. Moreover, I declare to you that the LORD will build you a house.
zh: 好像我吩咐士師統治我的子民以色列人的日子一樣。我必制伏你所有的仇敵，並且我告訴你，耶和華必為你建立家室。

en: When your days are fulfilled to walk with your fathers, I will raise up your offspring after you, one of your own sons, and I will establish his kingdom.
zh: 你的壽數滿足，歸你列祖那裡的時候，我必興起你的後裔接替你，他是你的眾子中的一位；我必堅立他的國。

en: He shall build a house for me, and I will establish his throne forever.
zh: 他要為我建造殿宇，我必堅立他的王位，直到永遠。

en: I will be to him a father, and he shall be to me a son. I will not take my steadfast love from him, as I took it from him who was before you,
zh: 我要作他的父親，他要作我的兒子；我的慈愛必不離開他，像離開在你以前的那位一樣；

en: but I will confirm him in my house and in my kingdom forever, and his throne shall be established forever.'"
zh: 我卻要把他堅立在我的家裡和我的國裡，直到永遠；他的王位必永遠堅立。’”

en: In accordance with all these words, and in accordance with all this vision, Nathan spoke to David.
zh: 拿單就按著這一切話和他所見的一切，告訴了大衛。

en: Then King David went in and sat before the LORD and said, "Who am I, O LORD God, and what is my house, that you have brought me thus far?
zh: 於是大衛王進去，坐在耶和華面前，說：“耶和華 神啊，我是甚麼人？我的家算甚麼，你竟帶領我到這個地步？

en: And this was a small thing in your eyes, O God. You have also spoken of your servant's house for a great while to come, and have shown me future generations, O LORD God!
zh: 神啊，這在你眼中看為小事，你對你僕人的家的未來發出應許！耶和華 神啊，你看我好像一個高貴的人。

en: And what more can David say to you for honoring your servant? For you know your servant.
zh: 你把榮耀加在你僕人身上，我還有甚麼話可以對你說呢？你認識你的僕人。

en: For your servant's sake, O LORD, and according to your own heart, you have done all this greatness, in making known all these great things.
zh: 耶和華啊，為了你僕人的緣故，也是按著你的心意，你行了這一切大事，為要使人知道這一切大事。

en: There is none like you, O LORD, and there is no God besides you, according to all that we have heard with our ears.
zh: 耶和華啊，照著我們耳中所聽見的，沒有誰能與你相比；除你以外，再沒有別的神。

en: And who is like your people Israel, the one nation on earth whom God went to redeem to be his people, making for yourself a name for great and awesome things, in driving out nations before your people whom you redeemed from Egypt?
zh: 世上有哪一個國能比得上你的子民以色列呢？ 神親自把他們救贖出來，作自己的子民，又在你從埃及所救贖出來的子民面前驅逐列國，以大而可畏的事建立自己的名。

en: And you made your people Israel to be your people forever, and you, O LORD, became their God.
zh: 你使你的子民以色列永遠作你的子民；耶和華啊，你也作了他們的 神。

en: And now, O LORD, let the word that you have spoken concerning your servant and concerning his house be established forever, and do as you have spoken,
zh: 耶和華啊，現在求你永遠堅立你應許你僕人和他的家的話，照著你所說的實行吧。

en: and your name will be established and magnified forever, saying, 'The LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, is Israel's God,' and the house of your servant David will be established before you.
zh: 願你的名永遠堅立、尊大，以致人人都說：‘萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神，實在是以色列人的 神。’這樣，你僕人大衛的家就在你面前得到堅立了。

en: For you, my God, have revealed to your servant that you will build a house for him. Therefore your servant has found courage to pray before you.
zh: 我的 神啊，因為你啟示了你的僕人，要你的僕人為你建造殿宇，所以你僕人才敢在你面前這樣禱告。

en: And now, O LORD, you are God, and you have promised this good thing to your servant.
zh: 耶和華啊，唯有你是 神，你曾應許把這福氣賜給你的僕人；

en: Now you have been pleased to bless the house of your servant, that it may continue forever before you, for it is you, O LORD, who have blessed, and it is blessed forever."
zh: 現在請你賜福你僕人的家，使它在你面前永遠存留。耶和華啊，因為你已經賜福了你僕人的家，它必永遠蒙福。”
